name: Florida Bay Snickers Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a 9-inch pie shell, remove the fluted rim and place it in the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake the crust in a 350°F oven until golden brown. Allow the pan to cool, then grease the sides.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, and 1 egg. Beat until smooth.
4. Scrape down the sides of the bowl, add the remaining eggs, and beat until smooth and completely blended.
5. Cut Snickers bars length-wise, then crosswise into about 14-16 pieces. Fold the Snickers chunks into the cream cheese batter with a rubber spatula.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared crust in the springform pan.
7. Bake at 275°F for 2 hours. Allow to cool completely in the refrigerator.
8. Remove from the springform pan and place on a serving plate.
9. Melt caramels with 1 tbsp whipping cream in a microwave oven. Remove from the microwave and blend thoroughly.
10. Spread the caramel on top of the cheesecake, stopping about 1-inch from the edge.
11. Melt semisweet chocolate morsels with 3 tbsp whipping cream in a microwave oven for 30 seconds on high setting. Remove from the microwave, blend thoroughly, and spread over the caramel to within about 1/2 inch of the edge.
12. Sprinkle chopped peanuts on top of the cheesecake.
